name: Invisible Chain Shirt
description:
This +2 resilient chain shirt is itself invisible. Other creatures can't see it at all, allowing you to wear it surreptitiously. Additionally, the armor's invisible composition is quieter and more comfortable than a normal chain shirt. It loses the noisy trait and gains the comfort trait.

Activate 2 envision

Frequency once per minute

Effect You Stride and turn partially invisible, becoming until the end of your next turn or until you use a hostile action, whichever comes first. As normal, you can use the concealment from this activation to .
